CVE-2025-54955.title: OpenNebula Community Edition (CE) before 7.0.0 and Enterprise Edi ...
CVE-2025-54955.description: OpenNebula Community Edition (CE) before 7.0.0 and Enterprise Edition (EE) before 6.10.3 have a critical FireEdge race condition that can lead to full account takeover. By exploiting this, an unauthenticated attacker can obtain a valid JSON Web Token (JWT) belonging to a legitimate user without knowledge of their credentials.

CVE-2025-56534.title: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the custom authenti ...
CVE-2025-56534.description: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the custom authenticator driver of opennebula v6.10.0.1 allows attackers to execute arbitrary web scripts or HTML via a crafted payload.

CVE-2025-56535.title: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in opennebula v6.10.0. ...
CVE-2025-56535.description: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in opennebula v6.10.0.1 allows attackers to execute arbitrary web scripts or HTML via injecting a crafted payload into the zone attribute parameter.

CVE-2025-56536.title: A stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in opennebula v ...
CVE-2025-56536.description: A stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in opennebula v6.10.0.1 allows attackers to execute arbitrary web scripts or HTML via injecting a crafted payload into the user information parameter.

CVE-2025-56537.title: A stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in opennebula v ...
CVE-2025-56537.description: A stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in opennebula v6.10.0.1 and fixed in v.7.0 allows attackers to execute arbitrary web scripts or HTML via injecting a crafted payload into the virtual network template parameter.
